strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (15+ years) with deep expertise in the primary stack, including TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling, perfectly matching a niche job requirement.
Exceptional background in software testing and quality assurance, including advocating for TDD, authoring testing libraries, and teaching testing courses.
concerns: Lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest/Playwright, though his deep general testing and Node.js expertise mitigates this.
Missing experience with Kotlin or Python, which are noted as required or secondary technologies for backend services.
Recent employment history includes a very short tenure at re:cinq (6 months) followed by a career gap.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate for the Senior Fullstack Developer role, bringing over 15 years of engineering experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React. His background heavily aligns with the core architectural, cloud, and containerization requirements, and he notably possesses the highly specific AI-agent development experience requested. While he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js or Vitest, his profound background in TDD—including authoring test runners and teaching testing courses—suggests he will easily adapt to the team's specific tooling.
